description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library вЂ” fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
Download
Pick your platform from the Assets below:

> Running on macOS вЂ” the app isn't code-signed, so Gatekeeper quarantines it on first launch. After dragging Noctis into your Applications folder, clear the flag once in Terminal:
>
> xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Noctis.app
>
> Then open Noctis normally.
What's Changed
- Added repeat controls to the playback bar
- Added Mini Player volume controls with animated popout slider
- Added Linux AppImage in-app update support
- Added launch at login support for Windows, macOS, and Linux
- Added optional start minimized to tray at login
- Added macOS and Linux audio keep-alive support
- Added metadata save loading indicator
- Fixed playback restarting when clicking empty areas of the seek bar
- Fixed animated artwork causing the app to freeze while saving
- Fixed macOS installer launch failures during updates
- Fixed seek clicks and audio pops during playback
- Fixed playback not resuming after seeking from the end of a track
- Fixed brief full-volume playback when changing tracks
- Fixed audio interruptions when saving metadata on macOS
- Fixed AutoMix cleanup crashes
- Fixed EQ Flat and Reset loudness inconsistencies
- Fixed macOS album description overlay alignment
- Fixed track-start audio clipping
- Improved animated artwork saving performance
- Improved cross-platform update detection and installer selection
- Improved audio keep-alive reliability across supported platforms
- Improved metadata save feedback with loading indicators
- Improved Mini Player volume controls and animations
- Improved startup settings with launch at login and tray options
Full Changelog: v1.2.1...v1.2.2
